title: Marigolds
description: Adds a new flower to the game, the marigold.
body: # Marigolds This mod adds a new flower called the marigold. They can be found in patches within these biomes: - plains - snowy plains - birch forest - forest - flower forest A marigold can be used to make orange dye like an orange tulip. Using the marigold in a suspicious stew recipe gives you glowing. You can place the flower in a pot like any other ordinary flower. They're a cool flower; what can I say? They are a great decoration and pair well with the blue cornflower. Go to my [profile]([profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Beast135)) to find Marigold Rings, an addon showing how well they pair with the cornflower:) ##
